<div class="relative text-neutral-400 dark:text-neutral-400" x-data="{ spotlight: { x: 0, y: 0 } }" @mousemove="const rect = $el.getBoundingClientRect(); spotlight = { x: $event.clientX - rect.left, y: $event.clientY - rect.top }"> <div class="absolute w-full text-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-100" x-data="{ isDark: window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches || document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark') }" :style=" 'mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at ' + spotlight.x + 'px ' + spotlight.y + 'px, black 0%, transparent ' + (isDark ? '150px' : '120px') + '); -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at ' + spotlight.x + 'px ' + spotlight.y + 'px, black 0%, transparent ' + (isDark ? '600px' : '400px') + ');' "> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::icons.laravel-ascii /> </div> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::icons.laravel-ascii /> </div>
